title: Brannigan Begin Again

jokes.text: Or like the Federation from Star Trek.
jokes.setup: Professor explains DOOP is like the United Nations
jokes.punchline: Leela adds pop culture reference that's more accessible to sci-fi fans
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective meta joke acknowledging the show's own sci-fi influences

jokes.text: Okay. But don't run with them!
jokes.setup: They're delivering oversized scissors for a ceremony
jokes.punchline: Professor treats them like children with safety scissors
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Professor's absent-minded parental instincts

jokes.text: A reception table with muffins!
jokes.setup: Fry is amazed by a million aliens
jokes.punchline: Gets distracted by mundane refreshments instead
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry moment - his simple 20th-century mind missing the cosmic for the everyday

jokes.text: Big rats there. Me crush with club.
jokes.setup: Polite cocktail party small talk about planets
jokes.punchline: Amazon responds with primitive violence
jokes.explanation: Economy of language and character contrast with civilized setting works well

jokes.text: I have no strong feelings one way or the other.
jokes.setup: Asked for thoughts on the diplomatic headquarters
jokes.punchline: Perfectly neutral non-response to ceremonial question
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character concept - absolute neutrality taken to absurd logical extreme. Highly quotable.

jokes.text: I hate these filthy Neutrals. You know where enemies stand. But with Neutrals, who knows? It sickens me.
jokes.setup: Zapp as military leader should appreciate neutrality
jokes.punchline: Finds neutrality more threatening than actual enemies
jokes.explanation: Great Zapp logic - his paranoid military mind can't handle uncertainty

jokes.text: He means you guys did it.
jokes.setup: Zapp says suggestively 'I believe we've met'
jokes.punchline: Bender bluntly explains the sexual implication
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender - no filter, stating uncomfortable truths

jokes.text: The Yarn People of Nylar Four.
jokes.setup: Leela asks who could be hurt by dull scissors
jokes.punchline: Zapp invents absurdly vulnerable alien race
jokes.explanation: Absurd worldbuilding joke - of course there would be yarn-based aliens vulnerable to scissors

jokes.text: But you forgot one thing: Rock crushes scissors.
jokes.setup: Treating scissors as weapons in assassination plot
jokes.punchline: Applies rock-paper-scissors logic to military strategy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation of children's game logic applied to serious military situation

jokes.text: But paper covers rock. And scissors cuts paper.
jokes.setup: Zapp's rock-paper-scissors military logic
jokes.punchline: Kif continues the game to its logical conclusion
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation showing Kif's logical mind trapped by Zapp's absurd premises

jokes.text: Kif, we have a conundrum. Search them for paper. And bring me a rock.
jokes.setup: Rock-paper-scissors military logic established
jokes.punchline: Zapp treats it as serious tactical problem requiring real items
jokes.explanation: Peak absurdist comedy - taking children's game to ultimate logical extreme with military precision

jokes.text: What makes a man turn Neutral? Lust for gold? Power? Or were you born with a heart of Neutrality?
jokes.setup: Standard villain interrogation about motives
jokes.punchline: Treating neutrality as evil character flaw with dramatic delivery
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Zapp's dramatic paranoia about the least threatening position

jokes.text: Kif, I don't need your that-may-not-be-wise attitude.
jokes.setup: Kif offers reasonable caution about using ship's laser
jokes.punchline: Zapp turns prudent advice into character flaw
jokes.explanation: Good character dynamics - Zapp dismissing wisdom as personality defect

jokes.text: Whoopsie-daisy.
jokes.setup: Just destroyed DOOP headquarters with laser
jokes.punchline: Casual, childish response to massive destruction
jokes.explanation: Perfect understatement - treating catastrophic military blunder like minor accident

jokes.text: Absolutely 99 percent not guilty.
jokes.setup: Asked how he pleads to charges
jokes.punchline: Mathematically specific non-denial that admits partial guilt
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay showing Zapp's inability to fully lie even when it would help him

jokes.text: Your Honor, I'm a simple hyper-chicken from a backwoods asteroid...
jokes.setup: Courtroom procedure with prosecutor introducing himself
jokes.punchline: Lawyer is literally a chicken with folksy mannerisms
jokes.explanation: Great visual absurdity combined with southern lawyer stereotype

jokes.text: but if it please the court, I'll call the entire jury.
jokes.setup: Standard witness calling procedure
jokes.punchline: Calls jury as witnesses to their own deliberation
jokes.explanation: Absurd legal procedure that somehow makes logical sense

jokes.text: The jury will disregard its testimony.
jokes.setup: Jury just testified about what they witnessed
jokes.punchline: Judge tells jury to ignore their own testimony
jokes.explanation: Logical absurdity of legal system where jury must ignore what they themselves said

jokes.text: That's a dumb question. What matters is Zapp's the worst captain ever.
jokes.setup: Lawyer asks about irrelevant detail (wearing a skirt)
jokes.punchline: Leela correctly identifies the absurdity and pivots to real issue
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Leela's directness cutting through legal nonsense

jokes.text: The same man who didn't blow up DOOP headquarters.
jokes.setup: Establishing Zapp was Leela's sexual partner
jokes.punchline: Somehow this proves his innocence despite obvious guilt
jokes.explanation: Absurd legal logic connecting unrelated facts to reach predetermined conclusion

jokes.text: But you can't take away his integrity and honor. Plus, it was Kif's fault.
jokes.setup: Noble speech about maintaining dignity in defeat
jokes.punchline: Immediately throws subordinate under the bus
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zapp moment - high-minded rhetoric immediately undercut by cowardice

jokes.text: One day a man has everything. Then he blows up a $400 billion space station. Next he has nothing. Makes you think.
jokes.setup: Philosophical reflection on his downfall
jokes.punchline: Treats massive destruction as minor setback in life journey
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy showing Zapp's inability to grasp consequences

jokes.text: No, it doesn't.
jokes.setup: Zapp's pseudo-philosophical 'makes you think'
jokes.punchline: Bender's blunt rejection of forced profundity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender response - cuts through BS with minimal words

jokes.text: That's an order, soldier!
jokes.setup: Zapp and Kif are now civilians
jokes.punchline: Zapp still gives military orders despite having no authority
jokes.explanation: Character consistency showing Zapp's inability to adapt to new reality

jokes.text: And the second one with real hoses.
jokes.setup: Third hose fight broken up
jokes.punchline: Implies previous 'hose fights' were sexual euphemism
jokes.explanation: Innuendo joke that works through misdirection and economy

jokes.text: I didn't know where else to turn. You're the only one who loved me.
jokes.setup: Desperate Zapp showing up at Planet Express
jokes.punchline: Pathetically appeals to Leela based on past sexual encounter
jokes.explanation: Effective cringe moment showing Zapp's desperation and delusion

jokes.text: Let me work for food. I'll paint, or service you sexually, or mop up.
jokes.setup: Zapp begging for work
jokes.punchline: Casually lists sexual services alongside mundane tasks
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy showing Zapp's desperation and inappropriate boundaries

jokes.text: You can't do any of those things. - Kif might.
jokes.setup: Leela rejects Zapp's offers
jokes.punchline: Zapp immediately volunteers Kif for same degrading tasks
jokes.explanation: Shows Zapp's willingness to exploit Kif even in desperate circumstances

jokes.text: He'll distract people from our awful safety record. Come in!
jokes.setup: Deciding whether to hire disgraced captain
jokes.punchline: Professor's cynical reasoning about PR distraction
jokes.explanation: Good Professor moment showing his amoral business calculations

jokes.text: The green dude and the fat man. - I haven't seen that robot before.
jokes.setup: Professor identifying new employees
jokes.punchline: Doesn't recognize Bender who's worked there for years
jokes.explanation: Classic Professor senility gag - forgetting longtime employee

jokes.text: I'm Bender. You know, the lovable rascal.
jokes.setup: Professor doesn't recognize him
jokes.punchline: Bender describes himself with positive traits he doesn't have
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Bender's delusional self-image

jokes.text: you might be crushed by your own hair.
jokes.setup: Warning about high gravity planet
jokes.punchline: Absurdly specific and trivial danger from extreme conditions
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist concept - extreme physics creating mundane danger

jokes.text: No, she just makes us work.
jokes.setup: Zapp asks if Leela spanks the crew for discipline
jokes.punchline: Fry's innocent response treats work as equally bad
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Fry's lazy mindset where work is torture

jokes.text: But should she ever institute some sort of spanking policy... I'll go for you. I won't have my comrades harmed.
jokes.setup: Learning there's no corporal punishment
jokes.punchline: Zapp volunteers for sexual fantasy disguised as noble sacrifice
jokes.explanation: Classic Zapp - perverse self-interest disguised as heroism

jokes.text: Even if he is a hot, sexy, female man.
jokes.setup: Toast to working for 'the man'
jokes.punchline: Zapp's confused gender description of Leela
jokes.explanation: Awkward attempt at compliment showing Zapp's confused thinking

jokes.text: This is the happiest day of my life.
jokes.setup: Leela gives Kif basic professional praise
jokes.punchline: Kif's extreme emotional response to minimal kindness
jokes.explanation: Shows how starved Kif is for basic respect after working for Zapp

jokes.text: Hey, no prob. This lead apron will protect me.
jokes.setup: Warning about intense gravity
jokes.punchline: Bender misunderstands gravity as radiation hazard
jokes.explanation: Shows Bender's technological ignorance despite being a robot

jokes.text: That's using your noodle.
jokes.setup: Obvious bad plan that will cause disaster
jokes.punchline: Zapp praises obviously stupid decision
jokes.explanation: Shows Zapp's consistently poor judgment and leadership

jokes.text: Come on, girdle. Hold...
jokes.setup: Bender straining under massive weight
jokes.punchline: Appeals to his girdle like it's alive, then presumably breaks
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy setup with Bender's anthropomorphic relationship with his body parts

jokes.text: Don't get your panties in a knot.
jokes.setup: Leela angry about their predictable failure
jokes.punchline: Bender's casually sexist dismissal
jokes.explanation: Lazy gendered insult that relies on sexism rather than wit

jokes.text: I have a serious question. Does the company that made your bra do girdles? I ask because a friend...
jokes.setup: Supposedly asking serious work question
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate personal question disguised as inquiry for 'friend'
jokes.explanation: Classic workplace harassment disguised as innocent question

jokes.text: I'm Leela. Get to work.
jokes.setup: Kif imitating Leela for the crew
jokes.punchline: Reduces her entire personality to work demands
jokes.explanation: Shows crew's oversimplified view of Leela as taskmaster

jokes.text: Once he actually ordered me to... shave his armpits while he was in the tub.
jokes.setup: Complaining about humiliating work for Zapp
jokes.punchline: Extremely specific and degrading personal service
jokes.explanation: Effectively disgusting and specific example of Zapp's abuse of power

jokes.text: If she let us use the backup, we'd have broken it and given up.
jokes.setup: Blaming Leela for their current misery
jokes.punchline: Admits their own inevitable incompetence while still blaming her
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing their twisted logic and self-awareness

jokes.text: Beer? - Underwear?
jokes.setup: Zapp mentions his relaxed leadership style
jokes.punchline: Crew fixates on the appealing aspects (beer and underwear)
jokes.explanation: Shows what motivates the crew - simple pleasures over professional competence

jokes.text: Hear that? I'm actually laughing.
jokes.setup: Kif celebrating freedom from Zapp
jokes.punchline: Has to point out his own laughter because it's so rare
jokes.explanation: Sad character moment showing how oppressed Kif has been

jokes.text: Then the laundry room... which will hereafter be called the 'brig.'
jokes.setup: Ship doesn't have proper brig for imprisonment
jokes.punchline: Zapp officially renames room to solve problem
jokes.explanation: Shows Zapp's bureaucratic thinking - solve practical problems with paperwork

jokes.text: Put them in the laundry brig.
jokes.setup: Zapp asking what to do with his civilian clothes
jokes.punchline: Uses his newly renamed brig terminology
jokes.explanation: Good callback that shows Zapp sticking to his arbitrary decision. Economical.

jokes.text: That's not enough. You're to sit and drink until you're as loyal as Kif.
jokes.setup: Crew pledges 'ten hundred percent' loyalty
jokes.punchline: Zapp demands even more loyalty through alcohol consumption
jokes.explanation: Good Zapp logic - solve loyalty problems through substance abuse

jokes.text: Maybe not to you. But you were court-martialed in disgrace.
jokes.setup: Kif says his plan makes no sense
jokes.punchline: Zapp uses Kif's shared punishment to dismiss his judgment
jokes.explanation: Shows Zapp's ability to blame Kif for shared consequences

jokes.text: Burn! - Nailed you, buddy!
jokes.setup: Zapp's weak insult toward Kif
jokes.punchline: Crew enthusiastically celebrates mediocre burn
jokes.explanation: Shows crew's low standards for entertainment and loyalty to bad leader

jokes.text: And they'll be like...and we'll have pancakes to celebrate. And I'll be like...
jokes.setup: Fry getting excited about fighting neutrals
jokes.punchline: His battle fantasy includes celebration pancakes
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry moment - his priorities shift from combat to breakfast food. Good character work.

jokes.text: Fly the white flag of war.
jokes.setup: Standard white flag of peace/surrender
jokes.punchline: Zapp reverses the meaning while keeping military formality
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that perfectly captures Zapp's backwards military thinking

jokes.text: All I know is my gut says maybe.
jokes.setup: Asked if they can trust Zapp's peace message
jokes.punchline: Even gut instincts are completely neutral
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback that escalates the neutrality concept to gut instincts. Highly quotable.

jokes.text: Yes. That's what I meant by loyalty.
jokes.setup: Crew asks if plan will kill them
jokes.punchline: Zapp casually confirms death is expected price of loyalty
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy showing Zapp's casual attitude toward subordinate lives

jokes.text: It's sweaty. You may need baby powder.
jokes.setup: Zapp putting on the only space suit to escape
jokes.punchline: Casually mentions the suit is sweaty and suggests baby powder
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment. Zapp's casual grossness while abandoning everyone is characteristic.

jokes.text: Let me guess. He canceled naptime? He ran out of beer? So he's about to kill us?
jokes.setup: Crew wants her back as captain
jokes.punchline: Leela correctly escalates from trivial to mortal complaints
jokes.explanation: Good escalation joke showing Leela knows the crew's priorities and Zapp's patterns

jokes.text: She actually listens to what I have to...
jokes.setup: Kif explaining why he wants to stay with Leela
jokes.punchline: Cut off mid-sentence, proving Zapp doesn't listen
jokes.explanation: Perfect structural joke where the interruption proves his point about not being heard

jokes.text: As your God is my witness.
jokes.setup: Leela asking if crew will do what she says even if she makes them work
jokes.punchline: Bender uses religious oath despite being a robot
jokes.explanation: Decent Bender moment. Robot using religious language is mildly absurd but not exceptional.

jokes.text: If I die, tell my wife, 'Hello.'
jokes.setup: Dramatic last words in face of death
jokes.punchline: Most neutral possible message to loved one
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation of neutrality concept to deathbed message. Perfect economy and character integration. Highly quotable and memorable.

jokes.text: Unless we hit a time warp, don't worry about it.
jokes.setup: Fry worried about dying at age 25
jokes.punchline: Bender's casual dismissal with sci-fi caveat
jokes.explanation: Good Bender moment showing his casual attitude with genre-aware exception

jokes.text: When Leela panicked, maybe because of female troubles... my quick mind saved the day.
jokes.setup: Leela successfully saved everyone from crash
jokes.punchline: Zapp takes credit and blames her competence on 'female troubles'
jokes.explanation: Shows Zapp's sexism and self-aggrandizement but lacks originality

jokes.text: It's true. My female incompetence, his cat-like reflexes... the stuff that made no sense, all of it.
jokes.setup: Zapp's ridiculous version of events
jokes.punchline: Leela sarcastically agrees to absurd characterization to get rid of him
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Leela's strategic sarcasm and self-sacrifice

jokes.text: Oh, man. - Let's mutiny.
jokes.setup: Leela denies time off after all they've been through
jokes.punchline: Immediately planning another mutiny over minor issue
jokes.explanation: Good circular ending showing crew learned nothing, will repeat their mistakes

tmdb_overview: Upon destroying the new DOOP headquarters, Zapp Brannigan and Kif find themselves court-martialed and dishonorably discharged. They take up jobs at Planet Express, where Kif learns what respect feels like and Zapp incites a mutiny against Leela.
